description_long: This vending machine features a tall, rectangular structure with a dark brown, wood-like exterior and a prominent, black, pyramid-shaped roof. The front face is recessed and painted blue, housing a display area with several shelves containing various bottles and packages. A red panel with white text is situated below the shelves, likely serving as branding or instructions. The sides and back are solid brown panels with a wood grain texture, lacking any visible openings or interactive elements. The overall design is robust and weather-resistant, suitable for outdoor urban environments. The machine's front is the only interactive side, with all functional components concentrated there.
description: A tall, wood-paneled vending machine with a black pyramid roof and a blue recessed front displaying shelves of products and a red branding panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue recessed display area with shelves of products, a red branding panel, and the main interactive features.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid brown wood-textured panel and the overhanging black roof, with no visible interactive elements.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain brown wood-textured panel and the black roof, with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a solid brown wood-textured panel and the black roof.
attribute_display_panel: A rectangular display panel is located at the upper center of the recessed blue front, showing product images and possibly instructions.
attribute_product_retrieval_slot: A rectangular slot is located below the product shelves, above the red panel, likely for retrieving purchased items.
attribute_branding_or_signage: A red rectangular panel with white text or logo is located at the lower center of the front face, serving as branding or signage.
